title: 1 Pack Small Stainless Steel Fine Mesh Strainers with Kitchen Hooks,8 Cm Diameter Mini Fine Mesh Sieve Tea Strainers Kitchen Colander Sieve with Handle - Ideal for Juice Egg Tea Coffee Flour Filter
features: Package Includes - You will get 1Piece 8cm fine mesh strainer spoon, for your convenience in storage, we also equip you with 1 self-adhesive hook, which can meet your daily use needs.

High-Quality Material - The main material of this filter spoon is high-quality food-grade stainless steel material, which is sturdy and durable, high temperature resistant, anti-corrosion and easy to clean.

Product Dimensions - The total length is 20cm/7.87in, the diameter of the filter spoon is 8cm/3.14in, the depth is 3.2cm/1.26in, the handle length is 10cm/3.9in, long enough and lightweight for arthritis patients is very friendly.

Wide range of uses - This small filter is suitable for a variety of scenarios. It can be used to filter tea, flour, fish out fried chicken, French fries, etc.; in addition, it can also be used to filter scale in the kettle.
Warranty- If you have any questions, please contact our store in time. We will give you a satisfactory solution.
description: Product Description Convenient for you to squeeze juice The long handle and hanging ears free your hands and can be used to filter juice. High Quality Small Sieve Made of high-quality stainless steel to ensure the filter is anti-corrosiveMini fine mesh strainer helps brew tea Filter Easily The fine mesh filter can be used to filter fruit tea, juice, matcha powder, flour, spices and other small foods.
